string 2:
I'm here to help encourage everyone. So I've got to keep at
it, no matter what. Right?

I'm telling everyone to have courage. That's all I'm capable
of at the moment, but...
{next}You nervous?
{next}It's not working?
{next}You should have some courage yourself.

Yes, I suppose I am, though I know it's only natural... I
can't just sit and do nothing.

Unfortunately not... It's just too much for me to handle on
my own.

Do I really look so dejected? Hehe. I suppose I can't really
hide my nervousness.

I'm not good at describing what I'm thinking, so it's kind
of hard to encourage people.

If I could use something other than words, I feel they'd be
able to give their best...

I've even got an idea for Digimon like me who are capable of
Armor Digivolution.
{next}So you're starting with those Digimon first?
{next}If they Digivolve, then they'll be better fighters.
{next}But they won't be cute anymore if they Digivolve.

Yes, if I make them stronger, they'll serve as a symbol of
courage for everyone else!

I foresee great trouble ahead, so it's best to be truly
ready for the challenge.

That's not necessarily true, but strength is more important
than cuteness at the moment.

I need Digi-Eggs for them to Armor Digivolve. First, I
require a Digi-Egg of Sincerity.
{next}Actually, I have a Digi-Egg of Sincerity.
{end}Sorry. I don't have one on me.
You do?! In that case, let's go! Hop on my back!

That's too bad. I'm sure Vulcanusmon could make you one,
though. Thanks for the help!
If only I had a Digi-Egg...!

Sorry to keep you waiting, friend! I've brought you a
Digi-Egg!

You have? Thank you so much! With this, I can hone my skills
even further!

All right, that went well. Thanks to you, I can offer
encouragement to my allies.
That takes care of our business here. Let's head back.

Thank you for the help! My friend was super happy and seems
to be feeling better now.

Although... I'm sorry to ask you this after you just helped
me, but...

I know of other Digimon who are also hoping to
Armor Digivolve.

They need Light, Friendship and Courage Digi-Eggs. Let me
know if you find any.
Oh, I almost forgot your reward. Thanks again for the help!
Greetings. Have you brought me a Digi-Egg for my allies?
{next}[Hand over the Digi-Egg.]
What do you need again?
Which Digi-Egg will you give me?

I have allies in need of Light, Friendship and Courage
Digi-Eggs, if you have any.
{next}A Digi-Egg of Light.
{next}A Digi-Egg of Friendship.
{next}A Digi-Egg of Courage.
{next}A Digi-Egg of Light.
{next}A Digi-Egg of Friendship.
{next}A Digi-Egg of Light.
{next}A Digi-Egg of Courage.
{next}A Digi-Egg of Friendship.
{next}A Digi-Egg of Courage.
{next}A Digi-Egg of Light.
{next}A Digi-Egg of Friendship.
{next}A Digi-Egg of Courage.
I want to be nice and strong like you, Pegasusmon...

I felt the same as you at first. And you can become
stronger... with this!

Oh, it's a Digi-Egg! Thank you! I can feel the light's rays
shining upon me!
If only I had the ability to avoid any kind of attack...

Yes, power is not only for hurting others! It can be used to
protect oneself, too!

Oh, it's a Digi-Egg! Thanks! I'm gonna give my very best out
there!

Thanks for coming, Pegasusmon! Now I can use my strength on
behalf of others!
I apologize for the delay! Here's your Digi-Egg!

I feel fires of courage burning within me that no one can
extinguish!

Excellent! You've Digivolved! Let's work together to do our
best!

Thank you for the Digi-Egg! That's another ally I was able
to help.

I helped all of my allies Armor Digivolve! Please accept
this token of my gratitude!
Let me know if you are ever in need of my shuriken skills!
{next}I want you on my side.
{end}I don't need your services at the moment.
Very well! I am honored to be of service!
I see... If you ever need a hand, please let me know.
Would you mind if I accompanied you on your journey?
{next}Not at all. Let's go.
{end}It's too dangerous.

Hee hee. I was hoping you would say that. Now, let us go
forth.
How unfortunate... However, I refuse to give up so easily.

I'm eager to test my newfound strength. Please, let me go
with you!
{next}All right.
{end}I need you to stay here and guard this place.

Hooray! I will race across this land at the speed of
lightning for our cause!

I feel myself getting slower the longer I'm here... Let me
know if you change your mind.

Hey, aren't you forgetting someone? A certain Digimon that
has fiery courage, maybe?
{next}Yes, we could use your help.
{end}Who could you be talking about?

Excellent! Consider the talents of the mighty Flamedramon to
be at your service!

Don't play dumb with me. I'm here to help. All you need to
do is ask me.
{next}Okay, I'll help.
{next}You're still here?
{next}Now you tell me!

I knew I could count on you! I hope I can continue to do so
in the future.

Yes. Yes, I am. I'm really eager to do something about those
guys...

I suppose my timing could've been better, but you understand
where I'm coming from, right?
